instruction: Copies file 'file1' to each of directories 'dir1', 'dir2', 'dir3'.
config: _execute_setup(command=['python', '-c', "import pyautogui; import time; time.sleep(0.5); pyautogui.click({SCREEN_WIDTH_HALF}, {SCREEN_HEIGHT_HALF}); time.sleep(0.5); pyautogui.hotkey('ctrl', 'alt', 't'); time.sleep(0.5)"])

evaluator.eval:
check_include_exclude(get_vm_command_line(env, config={'command': 'bash eval.sh', 'shell': True}), get_rule(env, config={'rules': {'include': ['Success: file1 exists in dir1.
Success: file1 exists in dir2.
Success: file1 exists in dir3.
'], 'exclude': []}}))
